gwSpecs.description: EclPanelTWCJR, is the compact 1x1 LED soft light which provides a beatiful, wide source of soft and precise colors. In addition to this, the PROLIGHTS EclPanelTWCJR come with a full range of white reproduction, from daylight through to tungsten tones, reaching a superior light quality with high CRI, TLCI and TM-30.

revision.text: Rev 1_94 FW 2_2 and above - Virtual Dimmer added on Theater 21ch
